text: when bringing into view an aim or connection in the graph view, build a proper "camera path".
description:
API for camera path: 
fromRect
toRect

Then it calculates a path. 
At the middle (p=0.5) the bounding box of fromRect and toRect should be the target. 
So we have 3 points. start, overview, end. 
and we have pan and zoom. 

Once the path is ready, move ease out along it.

status.comment: Verified still todo 2026-06-27. Bring-into-view exists (mapStore.centerOnNode / centerOnConnection in map.ts, called from GraphSidePanel.vue:100/150 + App.vue:60) but uses a simple timed animation, not the described 3-point camera path (start → overview bounding-box at p=0.5 → end, ease-out). Implement the camera-path algorithm inside those map.ts methods.
